Appearances:
Attorney, Chris Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (415.263.6511) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Plaintiff Whitney Leeman's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
